title: The Armies Rush Toward Alubarna
description: On pages 0–8, this part focuses on the armies rush toward alubarna, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Armies Rush Toward Alubarna. Alubarna becomes the battlefield where Koza, Cobra’s army, and Crocodile’s manipulation finally meet. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's nice hearing words with a natural rhythm, isn't it? Kappa no Kawanagare. Yappari Haru Nano ne. Suikari Akiawa ne. Battari ikidaore. Tsuppari mawashigeri. Kotter

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Guys! Make sure to get her safe!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Chopper! Keep this crab heading for Alabama!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: Wait, what!? You're just gonna leave him behind!?

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: If anything, we should feel sorry for crocodile!

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: There hasn't been a single person to piss off luffy and get away with it!

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Don't worry about him, VIVI! He'll be fine!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Luffy will hold down Crocodile here.

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: When the rebels decided to march on to the capital,

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: The time limit for this country's lifespan was set.

dialogue.speaker: Royal Army soldier
dialogue.text: This country will fall once the rebels clash with the royalties!

summary: This part develops the armies rush toward alubarna and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
